raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the core conceptual issue of inconsistency between the attention mechanism and the state-space model, proposes a reframing that aligns with prior work, and suggests a clear path forward.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and provides minimal repairs to make the draft logically consistent.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (Mamba/S6) and articulates the delta between the proposed method and this prior work, but does not map against multiple works.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for the actual contribution of the paper and suggests that the authors need to clarify their novel elements, which is a clear out-of-reach claim.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions requested without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (inconsistency and lack of clarity) and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the revisions made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core conceptual issue of inconsistency between the attention mechanism and the state-space model, proposes a reframing that aligns with prior work, and suggests a clear path forward.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks through the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and provides minimal repairs to make the draft logically consistent.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (Mamba/S6) and articulates the delta between the proposed method and this prior work, but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the actual contribution of the paper and suggests that the authors need to clarify their novel elements, which is a clear out-of-reach claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set, addressing all dimensions requested without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (inconsistency and lack of clarity) and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for the revisions made.
